mappings.control_id: Code executes in context of over-privileged agent credential — amplifies RCE impact

mappings.control_id: Code execution in production context with prod credentials

mappings.control_id: Shared credential means RCE in one agent affects all agents sharing the credential

mappings.notes: Ensures code execution boundaries are designed before implementation

mappings.notes: Prevents code execution vulnerabilities in agent implementation

mappings.control_id: Conduct adversarial testing targeting code execution — sandbox escapes, resource limit bypasses, self-modification, and host system access through generated code

mappings.control_id: Protect agent execution environments, sandbox configurations, and runtime constraints from unauthorised modification
mappings.control_name: PS.1.1-PS – Protect all code from unauthorised access
mappings.notes: Prevents weakening of execution boundaries through configuration tampering
Restrict agent code execution to minimum necessary scope; enforce sandbox boundaries, disable unnecessary language features, and limit filesystem and network access
Enforce strict boundary protection on agent code execution environments; isolate from production systems, restrict network access, and enforce resource limits
Scan agent-generated code for malicious patterns before execution; detect and block code that attempts filesystem access, network communication, or privilege escalation
Include agent code execution sandbox escape in penetration testing scope; test boundary integrity under adversarial conditions

mappings.control_name: Protection and Prevention — code execution controls
mappings.notes: Implement security controls restricting agent code execution — sandboxing, capability restrictions, network isolation, and resource limits
Include agent code execution sandbox escape in threat-led penetration testing; test boundary integrity under adversarial conditions

mappings.control_name: ICT Incident Management — code execution incident reporting
mappings.notes: Classify uncontrolled code execution events as ICT-related incidents; assess impact on financial systems and report per DORA criteria
